description: island sovereign state in the Caribbean Sea
description_wiki: Dominican Republic is a country on the Caribbean island of Hispaniola in the Greater Antilles of the Caribbean Sea in the North Atlantic Ocean.

description: land warfare branch of the Dominican Republic's military
description_wiki: The Dominican Army (Spanish: Ejército de República Dominicana), is one of the three branches of the Armed Forces of the Dominican Republic, together with the Navy and the Air Force.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

description: city in Duval County, and largest city in State of Florida, United States
description_wiki: Jacksonville (US:  , JAK-sən-vil; colloquially nicknamed Jax) is the most populous city proper in the U.S. state of Florida, located on the Atlantic coast of northeastern Florida.

description: 1958 maritime patrol aircraft family
description_wiki: The Lockheed P-3 Orion is a four-engined, turboprop anti-submarine and maritime surveillance aircraft developed for the United States Navy and introduced in the 1960s.

aliases: the Union of Soviet Socialist Republics
description: former country in Eurasia (1922–1991)
description_wiki: The Union of Soviet Socialist Republics (USSR), also known as the Soviet Union, was a transcontinental country that spanned much of Eurasia from 1922 until its dissolution in 1991.
